analysis_summary: EMERGENCY CYCLE: Bearish regime confirmed. Live positions force-closed at 23:17. BCH short at 50x was $2.45 from liquidation - dodged a -$14.65 forced loss by closing at -$6.32. BTC short closed at +$0.58. Wallet survived at $40.19 (from $46.26). Root cause: BCH 50x leverage on 17.5% daily range coin is terminal design error. stop_loss_multi.py had stop=$373.88 above liquidation=$371.85 - would never save the position. Paper strategies intact: combo31 at +$977 unrealized, futures_paper ETH short at +$8.82, meanrevert/$1,003 cash waiting.

decisions.reason: Liquidation at $371.85 only $2.45 above mark $369.40 at detection. Executed market close via emergency_ds0_close.py. Realized loss: -$6.32 (vs liquidation would be -$14.65 on $14.65 margin = 100% loss)
BTC short was safe ($3,500+ liq buffer) but closed for clean slate after BCH fiasco. Should not have been closed - was profitable exposure.

stop_loss_multi.py calculated stop=$373.88 for BCH but liquidation=$371.85. Stop was ABOVE liquidation - would never trigger before liquidation. Added get_liquidation_price() check that forces stop to be 0.2% inside liquidation price.
No new live positions until stop_loss_multi fix is battle-tested. contract_executor daemon not running. Must also add max-leverage-per-volatility rule.
combo31 BTC short at $77,138 now +$952 profit. ETH short at $2,120 now +$17. SOL short at $85.06 now +$8.35. Hold with tightened trails. futures_paper ETH short at $2,112.31 now +$8.82. Hold.

decisions.detail: Coins with >8% daily range: max 1x leverage. 3-8%: max 3x. <3%: max 10x. BCH at 17.5% = max 1x. Enforce in shared_config and contract_executor.

lessons_learned: 1. 50x leverage on BCH (17.5% daily range) is suicide - max 1x for high-vol coins
2. stop_loss_multi.py stop calc must always respect liquidation price proximity
3. Contract_executor.py not running = no automated close mechanism for dangerous positions
4. shared_config 'urgent_advice' is advisory only - need direct executable triggers
5. Total PnL from this session: -$5.74 (BCH -$6.32 + BTC +$0.58) - could have been -$14.65+
